summary: The stock has multiple bearish technical indicators, including a price below the 20-day moving average, weak momentum, and negative 20-day return momentum, outweighing the few bullish factors.
bullish_factors: MACD is above its signal line, indicating positive momentum.
The stock has positive 5-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is below the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is below the 26-day EMA, suggesting weak momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
